title: RPGuns
description: RPGuns adds a selection of craftable firearms to Minecraft, each with unique stats, custom 3D models, and full server-side configuration. Primary use is MCRPs
body:
RPGuns by Momoko
                                                                                                                              
  RPGuns adds a selection of craftable firearms to Minecraft, each with unique stats, custom 3D models, and full server-side configuration.                                                                                                                                                               

  Guns

  - Pistol Reliable sidearm. 6-round magazine, moderate fire rate.
  - Hunting Rifle High powered, single-shot. Pinpoint accuracy with scope zoom.
  - Shotgun Fires 5 pellets per blast with wide spread. 
  - Tommy Gun 30-round drum magazine with rapid fire. 

  Features

  - Custom 3D models and textures for all weapons and projectiles
  - R to reload plays a timed reload animation, consumes bullets from your inventory
  - ; to toggle silencer mutes fire and reload sounds per weapon
  - Z to zoom scoped aiming on supported weapons (Rifle, Tommy Gun)
  - Bullets crafted from gold nuggets and gunpowder
  - Projectiles fly straight, disappear on impact, and auto despawn after 30 seconds

  Server Configuration

  All settings are configurable via /rpguns commands (OP) or the rpguns-server.toml config file:

  - Toggle guns fire on/off globally
  - Toggle damage on/off (projectiles still show hit effects like snowballs)
  - Toggle sound globally
  - Toggle ammo requirements (free reloads for creative)
  - Set damage per weapon type individually

Crafting Recipes:
